mapper.select: select ui.college , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.create_time , bi.purpose , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , bi.booking_info_id , ui.phone_number , bi.end_time , bse.status_name , ui.registration_date , bi.booking_date , bi.start_time , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 , ui.name , bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , bi.time_period FROM booking_info bi left join user_info ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join booking_status_enum bse on bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 = bse.booking_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.college , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.create_time , bi.purpose , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , bi.booking_info_id , ui.phone_number , bi.end_time , bse.status_name , ui.registration_date , bi.booking_date , bi.start_time , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 , ui.name , bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , bi.time_period FROM booking_info bi left join user_info ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join booking_status_enum bse on bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 = bse.booking_status_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.college , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.create_time , bi.purpose , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , bi.booking_info_id , ui.phone_number , bi.end_time , bse.status_name , ui.registration_date , bi.booking_date , bi.start_time , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 , ui.name , bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , bi.time_period FROM booking_info bi left join user_info ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join booking_status_enum bse on bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 = bse.booking_status_enum_id where bi.booking_info_id = #{id}
